title: Free Music for YouTube Videos (No Copyright Claims)
description:
Want free music for your YouTube videos that won't get your video taken down? Here's exactly where to find it — right inside YouTube Studio.

Open YouTube Studio, click Creator Music in the left sidebar, switch to the Free tab at the top, then hit "View all" to browse every zero-cost track. This is YouTube's own built-in music library — songs that are fully cleared for use in your videos with no copyright claims from rights holders.

From there, use the genre and mood filters to find something that fits the vibe of your video. There are hundreds of options.

✅ Works for monetized videos
✅ No copyright strikes
✅ Free to use

🔔 Subscribe for more YouTube tips.

---
